transcript: And he didn't put up with any crap, and if he gave him crap, he weren't around, that's all there was to it. But Ditka should have been, as a player, should have been a bear for life, there's no question. It was all about coming when he left, and that's not how you want to be. Always good, always good, always good. With the Eagles, Ditka suffered through the worst years of his NFL career. At his lowest point, he received a call from the Dallas Cowboys head coach, Tom Landry. Do you think he can still play for the Bucs?
